@Karanpal25 @coi_nft Dear Karan,
From my conceptual WEB3 Animal Kingdom collection, I present you 2/8:

🐿️ The collector
🦟 The scammer

(Hand-drawn on Canson paper)
These symbolic creatures reflect an aspect of the human condition or behavior within the context of web3.

result.text:
Heyo! 🐰

Inner Whispers ~

The artwork delves into the universal theme of the human struggle to reconcile our inner selves with external influences and societal norms. The human experience of self-discovery which is fogged by the barriers we create to shield our vulnerabilities from the outside world.

Tagging: @graphicurve @graffitiongrave 

https://t.co/AWg9e8ofYB
